strengths: Comprehensive inclusion of patient history, social determinants, and past surgical history
Clear differentiation and prioritization of multiple potential diagnoses
Detailed connections showing pathophysiology from atrial fibrillation to heart failure and poor perfusion
Integration of illness scripts across several diagnoses
Strong linkage of basic science concepts to clinical findings
areas_for_improvement: Could include more explicit epidemiology data (e.g., prevalence of atrial fibrillation)
Some sections could be more visually organized for easier navigation
grading_notes: The concept map demonstrates a high level of integration, accurate synthesis of patient data with clinical reasoning, and thorough coverage of required case-specific expectations. Scores reflect comprehensive understanding across all evaluated domains.
